title: pouteria belizensis
intro: Pouteria belizensis, also known as the Belie plum or Belie tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to Belize and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Pouteria belizensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in reducing inflammation and preventing infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory ailments.
